# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot_repository:
  type: "s3" # or "fs" for file share
  settings:
    bucket: "your-s3-bucket-name"
    region: "your-region"
    access_key: "your-access-key"
    secret_key: "your-secret-key"
    base_path: "snapshots" # optional, S3 only
  compress: true

snapshot_policy:
  name: "daily-snapshot"
  schedule: "0 0 * * *" # Every day at midnight
  repository: "snapshot_repository"
  config:
    indices: ["*"] # Specify indices as needed
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false

restoration:
  repository: "snapshot_repository"
  snapshot_name: "daily-snapshot-{{yyyy-MM-dd}}" # Use a date format for the snapshot name
  indices: ["*"] # Specify indices to restore or leave as "*" for all
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false
  wait_for_completion: true
